mapper.select: SELECT t.ID AS id, t.YEAR AS year, t.MAINTENANCE_UNIT_ID AS maintenanceUnitId, t.MAINTENANCE_UNIT_NAME AS maintenanceUnitName, t.COST_TYPE AS costType, d.DICT_LABEL AS costTypeName, t.AMOUNT AS amount, t.CREATE_BY AS createBy, t.CREATE_TIME AS createTime, t.UPDATE_BY AS updateBy, t.UPDATE_TIME AS updateTime, t.WARNING_USER_ID, t.WARNING_USER_NAME, t.WARNING_AMOUNT FROM E_COST_BUDGET_MANAGEMENT t LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA d ON d.DICT_TYPE = 'EXPENSE_TYPE' AND d.DICT_VALUE = t.COST_TYPE AND d.STATUS = '1' WHERE t.ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_COST_BUDGET_MANAGEMENT ( ID, YEAR, MAINTENANCE_UNIT_ID, MAINTENANCE_UNIT_NAME, COST_TYPE, AMOUNT, WARNING_USER_ID, WARNING_USER_NAME, WARNING_AMOUNT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{year}, #{maintenanceUnitId}, #{maintenanceUnitName}, #{costType}, #{amount}, #{warningUserId}, #{warningUserName}, #{warningAmount}, #{loginUserId}, #{now}, #{loginUserId}, #{now} )
mapper.update: UPDATE E_COST_BUDGET_MANAGEMENT SET YEAR = #{year}, MAINTENANCE_UNIT_ID = #{maintenanceUnitId}, MAINTENANCE_UNIT_NAME = #{maintenanceUnitName}, COST_TYPE = #{costType}, AMOUNT = #{amount}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT u.ID AS userId, u.USER_NAME AS userName FROM SYS_USER u JOIN SYS_DEPT d ON u.DEPT_ID = d.ID JOIN SYS_ROLE_USER ru ON u.ID = ru.USER_ID JOIN SYS_ROLE r ON ru.ROLE_ID = r.ID WHERE u.STATUS = 1 AND r.STATUS = 1 AND r.ROLE_CODE = #{roleCode} AND (d.ID = #{useCompanyId} OR instr(d.PARENT_IDS, #{useCompanyId}) > 0) ORDER BY u.USER_NAME ASC
